title: Unlisted video demo page shows live board and embedded video
description:
Feature: Video demo page
  Scenario: Demo page exposes live kanban and video
    Given I open /demo
    Then I see an animated kanban board component
    And I see an embedded intro video player

  Scenario: Demo page is unlisted
    Given I inspect the primary navigation and footer
    Then I do not see a link to /demo
creator: unknown
